data.title: Dow Settles Above 45,000 For First Time As Salesforce, Marvell Surge: Investor Sentiment Improves, Fear Index In 'Greed' Zone
Warren Buffett Labeled It 'Playing With Fire' When The Indicator Named After Him Reached 140% — Cut To Today And Its Over 200%: Is A Downturn Looming?
data.description: The "Buffett Indicator', a market valuation measure, is currently signaling potential danger as it surpasses levels witnessed during the Dot-Com Bubble and the Great Financial Crisis.

data.title: Kroger, Five Below And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Thursday
Sam Altman Teases '12 Days Of OpenAI' Christmas Magic — Users Predict Unveiling Of Sora, o1 Reasoning Model And More
data.description: Sam Altman announced OpenAI's "12 Days of OpenAI" event, revealing a new model or feature daily from Dec. 5, with predictions including the AI video generator Sora, the full o1 reasoning model, and improvements to ChatGPT's Advanced Voice feature.
